author: robocopsgonemad
content: we're having a zoom issue, getting an error saying "The host has another meeting in progress" <@731289513942450317>  or perhaps <@642887713246150666> or any other <@&754066708418920553>  can help?

author: robocopsgonemad
content: nevermind, we are ok. it turns out assigning a new host to a meeting you've left is insufficient to make you available to host the next meeting. probably just a glitch.
